Basic leather

Basic leather
Type: Material
Value: 2
Fine Value: 15
Keywords: Leather
Processed
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

A piece of leather that's ready to be crafted into something more useful.

The Basic leather item is a material.

Contents

  • 1 Uses
    • 1.1 Recipe Ingredient
  • 2 Sources
    • 2.1 Primary Recipe Output

Uses

Recipe Ingredient

Basic leather is an ingredient in the following recipes:

Item Name Service
Requirement 		Skills Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Make apprentice handwear Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 18 1x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather		 1x Apprentice handwear
Make apprentice breeches Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 20 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather		 1x Apprentice breeches
Craft comfy fishing chair Needs Basic Sawmill service or better. Carpentry lvl. 22 5x Spruce plank
1x Basic leather		 1x Comfy fishing chair
Make an apprentice vest Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 22 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather		 1x Apprentice vest
Make spikescale mitts Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 23 1x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Lizard tail		 1x Spikescale mitts
Make spikescale chaps Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 25 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Lizard tail		 1x Spikescale chaps
Make a spikescale tunic Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 27 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Lizard tail		 1x Spikescale tunic
Make shadowquill bracers Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 28 1x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Dark feather		 1x Shadowquill bracers
Make shadowquill shorts Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 30 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Dark feather		 1x Shadowquill shorts
Make a shadowquill plastron Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 32 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Dark feather		 1x Shadowquill plastron
Make rootweave mitts Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 33 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Root		 1x Rootweave mitts
Make rootweave chaps Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 35 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Root		 1x Rootweave chaps
Make a rootweave tunic Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 37 3x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Root		 1x Rootweave tunic
Make journeyman handwear Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 38 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Animal fur		 1x Journeyman handwear
Make journeyman breeches Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 40 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Animal fur		 1x Journeyman breeches
Make a journeyman vest Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 42 3x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Animal fur		 1x Journeyman vest
Make aerofibril bracers Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 43 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Aerodynamic thread		 1x Aerofibril bracers
Make aerofibril shorts Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 45 3x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Aerodynamic thread		 1x Aerofibril shorts
Make an aerofibril plastron Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 47 3x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather
1x Aerodynamic thread		 1x Aerofibril plastron

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Make a basic leather

You tan animal hide into basic leather, learning the ancient techniques of preserving and shaping this natural resource.

Craft a simple, yet sturdy piece of leather.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Make a basic leather Tailoring lvl. 5 Needs Basic Loom service or better. 5x Hide scraps or 1x Basic hide 1x Basic leather
Recipe Experience
Recipe Name Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
Work Efficiency 		Max
XP/Step 		Full Recipe
W.E.A.R.
Make a basic leather 10 60 0.167 40 steps 150% 0.250 188 steps

Item Name Item Type Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.
Tailoring chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 actions 15,000 steps 10,000 steps
